column1: Hey Hunter, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
Liked “Hey Hunter, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details”
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Removed a like from “Hey Hunter, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details”
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Yea Cancun is popular for sure. Punta Cana too
how many ppl in your group so far?
Yea that's solid! All from the same school?
Not all the same but some of them gonna just come on second week of march instead of there spring break
Oh bet yea let's turn up
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Anytime tbh but at least before like second week of february
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send most of the info through email? It's a little long for text
Dope what's the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Got it, I will look it over rq
so u think cost wise it would be best to either have 4 and stay in a room or get 8 to get 2 rooms?
Also is it only 684 a person including the flights for the grand oasis 5 nights or do we gotta book our own flights
yea 4 or 8 or 12 etc is the cheapest way to go. thats the 684 5 nights price you see
flights are not included in that price. its cheapest to book those on your own
Alright sounds good, i'm gonna talk it over with my boys and I will text back later tn or tmr
aight bet bet lmk what they think
yoo Hunter whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
We looking heavy into the grand oasis one for 5 nights we just making sure we can get a for sure 8 people to go
word feel you! Grand O is lit
how many ppl def down to go so far
We got a for sure 4 so worst comes to worst us 4 just go but we got 4 people who talking it over w family and stuff
when do you think we need to book it by?
oh word okay bet. yea theres not really a set cutoff date but first prices go up and then it sells out. happens randomly based on availability
things are def moving fast right now so the sooner the better. dont want you to get stuck waiting on the other 4 and then miss out completely
we can always add them in afterward if theres still availability
Yeah that could work too but i'm hoping at least by friday we got a pretty clear idea of who all going
because we gotta pay 200 the second day after correct?
yea so the 200 is what gets you all reserved and secured. then your final balance is due two weeks from now. gives you a little time to gather yourself
yeah that will be nice fs but yeah i'm making a gc and gonna try and get everyone to figure out if they for sure in or not
word sounds good yea just lmk friday and we'll make a move from there
yerr whats good bro, did we wanna get things locked in?
I think tmr we might lock in one room for sure and just have the other book if another is avaible
yea we can do that. one room of 4 to start?
Yeah that's the plan honestly because i don't wanna wait and get screwed out yk
yea exactly. I'll set that up for you in the am
whats good fam! we ready to get things started?
Yeah i think we are ready
Cool I'll send over in 10. March 7-12 right
Do you think we could do 8th-13th?
just emailed that over brotha. lmk if anyone needs help getting secured on the res
it shows the 7th- 12th still I think
ahhh my b will update that rn
yoyo checkin in big dog were y'all able to get situated
Yo sorry just saw the text and we are signing up rn and we got a question abt the passport number. one of my boys passport is coming in a few days is he still able to join the trip
yea its all good you can skip the passport piece if you dont have it
itll let you keep going through with the account and deposit
hey when you got a sec, could you ask Grant to toss in his flight info?
yoyo is grant on the same flight as anyone else? I can add it in
it keeps saying he added it
but he is on same flight as jace
lol all good I'll add it in rn
side note, did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event with us?
is that just for off resort type of stuff?
is there a lot of bars at the resort?
like a lot of spots to pull up to grab a drink, but not like bar bars. theres only one nightclub on the resort
can we buy anything once we there?
you def can yea. just dont know what the price will be or what will be available
